title: Conversation
description: Canonical schema for a LinkedIn outreach conversation thread and its state machine. One file per prospect at outreach/conversations/<prospect_id>.json.

prospect_id.description: Must match the id field in the companion ProspectProfile file.

outreach_stage.description: Current stage of this conversation. The conversation-planner advances this field as the sequence progresses.

messages.description: Ordered list of all messages in this thread, oldest first.

last_action.description: The most recently executed action. Set by the automation layer after delivery.

last_action_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the last completed action.

next_action.description: Action that should be executed next. Set by conversation-planner; cleared to null by the automation layer after execution.

next_action_after.description: If set, the automation layer must not dispatch next_action before this UTC timestamp (rate-limiting / follow-up delays).

planned_message.description: The exact message text output by conversation-planner. Passed verbatim to the automation layer for delivery. Cleared after successful send.

connection_note.description: The note included with the LinkedIn connection request (≤300 chars). Populated during the cold → pending_connection transition.

resume_path.description: Relative path to the saved resume file, e.g. 'outreach/storage/resumes/alex_chen_softeng.pdf'. Set by the download-resume automation skill.

email.description: Prospect's email address if shared during the conversation.

meeting_link.description: Calendar or video call link for a scheduled meeting.

ended_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the conversation was marked ended or dead.

ended_reason.description: Terminal reason code set when outreach_stage becomes 'ended' or 'dead'.

report_path.description: Relative path to the end-of-sequence report file, e.g. 'outreach/storage/reports/alex_chen_softeng.md'. Written by conversation-planner at sequence close.

sequence_step.description: Which step of the 5-step outreach sequence was last sent (1=intro, 2=career-dive, 3=career-plan, 4=ask, 5=close). null before any message is sent.

stage_history.description: Append-only log of every stage transition. Useful for debugging and analytics.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for this transition.

sender.description: 'operator' = the outreach account (Nova); 'prospect' = the LinkedIn target.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the message.

sequence_step.description: For operator messages: which sequence step this message corresponds to.

attachments.description: Files or links shared in this message.
